title: Zehneria platysperma

It belongs to the genus Zehneria, which is a group of plants native to tropical and subtropical regions. The family Cucurbitaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as gourds or cucurbits. intro: Zehneria platysperma, also known as the Indian cucumber or bengal cucumber, is a plant species belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae, characterized by its edible fruit and leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it a potential treatment for various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
